name: RalphLabsAI
notes: Provider entry for Ralph, SN40 on Bittensor (netuid 40). Confirmed via on-chain SubnetIdentitiesV3 (native_name, source_repo, description) and the RalphLabsAI/ralph repository's own README, which self-identifies as "Live on Bittensor mainnet, netuid 40". This netuid was previously operated by a different team under the "Chunking" identity (see registry/providers/vectorchat.json).
